reviews.comment:
Buena la atención del personal de playa, no opino lo mismo del personal que atiende adentro de la estación, no te permiten usar los baños si no sos socio del ACA, motivo por el cual, en adelante iré a la Shell que está enfrente y tiene muy buenos baños y no tengo que ser socio de nada, en mi viaje de ida a Mendoza pare en la Shell y me atendieron muy bien

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach staff was good, but I can't say the same about the staff inside the station. They won't let you use the restrooms unless you're an ACA member, which is why I'll go to the Shell across the street from now on. It has very good restrooms and I don't need to be a member of anything. On my trip to Mendoza, I stopped at the Shell and they treated me very well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKeWI3V0F3EAE

reviews.comment:
La atención no es mala pero tampoco la mejor. Los precios son caros pero creo que esta acordé a lo que se cobra en las estaciones de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
The service isn't bad, but it's not the best either. The prices are high, but I think they're in line with what's charged at gas stations.
